name: Private Data Structure Returned From A Public Method
description: A public method returns a reference to a private mutable data structure, allowing external code to directly modify the object's internal state. This violates encapsulation by exposing internal data through the returned reference without creating a defensive copy.
detection_pattern: EGRESS(public_method) returning a direct reference to STORAGE(private_field) of a mutable type. Look for STORAGE(private_mutable)→EGRESS(public_return) without TRANSFORM(defensive_copy) as a mediator.
